message:
✨ Persist wizard selections to sessionStorage & open links in new tabs (#28)

- Save wizard state (selections, fish quantities, step) to sessionStorage
  on every change so navigating away and returning restores the build
- Serialize product IDs only (not full objects) to avoid bloat; rehydrate
  against the product catalog on mount
- URL params from Tank Calculator take priority over cached state
- Guide links and "Check compatibility" link now open in new tabs
  (target="_blank") to prevent wiping the user's selections

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
